title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・きっと、また

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Did you see how wild the crowd got? I bet they're
all your fans now, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It must feel really satisfying to flip it all on its
head.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We're known for our patience, y'know?
Fishermen, I mean. We're always waiting for the
perfect moment to strike.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...This isn't the end. I won't allow it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know that we'll race each other again. That's a
promise!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And the next time we meet, I'll be so fast you
won't even recognize me!

Special Week makes it through her battle with
Seiun Sky and grows in leaps and bounds.
